scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send: SIP/2.0 100 Trying [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Supported: timer,100rel Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Length: 0

SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:];tag=[call_number]pid1001 [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Allow: INVITE,ACK,OPTIONS,BYE,CANCEL,INFO,REFER,NOTIFY,PRACK,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length:[len]
v=0 o=root 21836 21836 IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] s=session c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio 15264 RTP/SAVP 0 8 120 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:120 0-16 a=silenceSupp:off - - - - a=ptime:20 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:rvqVrCCC06kWX+cU6IXyLLYzKR2ZD8kgoV0QNvyY a=encryption:optional a=sendrecv
